creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
Even after a full pkg update, nmbd fails to start from samba or the command line.

13:29:18 Fri, 28 Apr                                                                                [momcat:root]/usr/local/etc> nmbd -Si
nmbd version 4.2.14 started.
Copyright Andrew Tridgell and the Samba Team 1992-2014
Registered MSG_REQ_POOL_USAGE
Registered MSG_REQ_DMALLOC_MARK and LOG_CHANGED
added interface igb0 ip=192.168.0.96 bcast=192.168.0.255 netmask=255.255.255.0
added interface lo0 ip=::1 bcast= netmask=ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff:ffff
added interface lo0 ip=127.0.0.1 bcast=127.255.255.255 netmask=255.0.0.0
create_subnets: Ignoring loopback interface.
create_subnets: ignoring non IPv4 interface.
making subnet name:192.168.0.96 Broadcast address:192.168.0.255 Subnet mask:255.255.255.0
making subnet name:UNICAST_SUBNET Broadcast address:0.0.0.0 Subnet mask:0.0.0.0
making subnet name:REMOTE_BROADCAST_SUBNET Broadcast address:0.0.0.0 Subnet mask:0.0.0.0
queue_query_name: interface 1 has NULL IP address !
===============================================================
INTERNAL ERROR: Signal 11 in pid 1541 (4.2.14)
Please read the Trouble-Shooting section of the Samba HOWTO
===============================================================
PANIC (pid 1541): internal error
BACKTRACE: 7 stack frames:
 #0 0x8022dcc61 <log_stack_trace+0x21> at /usr/local/lib/libsmbconf.so.0
 #1 0x8022dca48 <smb_panic_s3+0x98> at /usr/local/lib/libsmbconf.so.0
 #2 0x8018de3b5 <smb_panic+0x35> at /usr/local/lib/libsamba-util.so.0
 #3 0x8018de99a <smb_panic+0x61a> at /usr/local/lib/libsamba-util.so.0
 #4 0x8018de373 <fault_setup+0x73> at /usr/local/lib/libsamba-util.so.0
 #5 0x80149bb4a <pthread_sigmask+0x51a> at /lib/libthr.so.3
 #6 0x80149b22c <pthread_getspecific+0xe1c> at /lib/libthr.so.3
unable to change to %N.core
refusing to dump core
